summary: Completed testing of Neural Network Builder with new Google OAuth integration and training accuracy display features. Successfully verified Sign In button visibility, code generation functionality, and training panel behavior. Found that training panel requires layers on canvas before opening.

integration_issues.issue: Training panel requires layers on canvas before opening - shows 'Add some layers first!' notification
integration_issues.description: Expected behavior - training panel should only open when there are layers to train

passed_tests: Sign In button visible in header with correct text 'Sign In'
Sign In button has proper data-testid='login-btn'
View Code button opens code modal successfully
Code modal has Copy and Download .py buttons
Layer palette displays all layer types (Dense/Linear, Conv2D, etc.)
React Flow canvas area found and functional
Training panel overlay appears when Train button clicked
Training panel shows appropriate validation message for empty canvas
All header buttons (theme toggle, clear canvas, view code, train, run, sign in) are present
Backend API endpoints all responding correctly (9/9 tests passed)
Auth endpoints properly return 401 for unauthenticated requests
